author: y4rr
content: Implemented on GPU: add_bf16_f32, sub_bf16_f32, mul_bf16_f32, div_bf16_f32 (PTX elementwise), sum_axis_bf16_f32, mean_axis_bf16_f32 (PTX axis reductions), relu_bf16_f32, sigmoid_bf16_f32 (PTX activations). All 8 ops: bf16 u16 input decoded on-device, f32 accumulation throughout, f32 output. PTX JIT on RTX 3090 / sm_52+. 13 probe tests pass in _probe_963_bf16_elementwise_reductions.rs.
